title: Fruit Jello
description: Colorful, wobbly fruit gelatin with fresh or canned fruit suspended inside. A fun and refreshing classic dessert.

ingredients.note: strawberries, mandarin oranges, halved grapes, or peach slices

ingredients.item: whipped cream or Cool Whip for serving

steps.instruction: Pour gelatin powder into a large bowl or 9x13 inch baking dish.
Add 2 cups boiling water. Stir vigorously for 2 full minutes until the gelatin is completely dissolved — no granules should remain.
Add 2 cups cold water and stir to combine.
Allow to cool at room temperature for 15 minutes.
Stir in prepared fruit pieces, distributing evenly throughout the liquid.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or until fully set and firm. Overnight setting is ideal.
Cut into squares or scoop into serving dishes. Top with whipped cream if desired.

notes: Don't add fruit before the gelatin has cooled slightly — very hot liquid will break down soft fruit. Canned pineapple or kiwi contain enzymes that prevent gelatin from setting, so avoid those.
